title: ChainManifest
description: Summary of a Decision Passport hash chain. Included in every BasicProofBundle.

chain_id.description: Identifier matching the chain_id of all records in the chain.

record_count.description: Total number of records in the chain.

last_record_id.description: UUID of the last record in the chain.

chain_hash.description: record_hash of the last record. Serves as the chain's terminal integrity anchor.
